title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan ships large codebases using Claude Code across parallel sessions with strategic prompt engineering. The video covers four practices: giving Claude a defined role, running parallel coding sessions, building custom tooling, and planning before implementation.
